title: Barqowc #1302
definition:
Barkos = "the son cut off"

 1) head of a family of temple-slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Barkos = "the son cut off"

 1) head of a family of temple-slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  one of the Nethinim
